text:
qualifies under another person’s 
account (for example, as a spouse or child), the code identifies the type of relationship between the 
individual and primary beneficiary. 

SHORT NAME: CRNT_BIC 

LONG NAME: CRNT_BIC_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: 10 = Railroad Retirement Board (RRB) 
Retirement employee or annuitant 

11 = RRB Survivor joint annuitant 
reduced benefits taken to insure 
benefits for surviving spouse 

13 = RRB Child of RR
